Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: Hunter falls in love with a beautiful professional killer who's connected to an arson case he's investigating.
Video.title: Straight To The Heart

Video.summary: McCall is charged with murder when the prime suspect in her dead detective husband's case is found dead.
Video.title: Requiem For Sergeant McCall

Video.summary: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen.
Video.title: Double Exposure

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pose as spouses to investigate the murder of a girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison.
Video.title: Any Second Now

Video.summary: A musician helps search for the assailant of a pregnant woman being kept alive until she can give birth.
Video.title: A Child Is Born

Video.summary: McCall fears that Hunter's temper will outweigh his judgement when his former girlfriend is murdered.
Video.title: Crossfire

Video.summary: McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating in a fleet of motor homes.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 1

Video.summary: As doctors prepare to operate on McCall, Hunter races to find whoever is killing potential witnesses.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 2

Video.summary: When Hunter disappears during an investigation, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed.
Video.title: Shades

Video.summary: A murder, but the victim seemingly never existed, and the killing appears to be professionally done.
Video.title: Not Just Another John Doe

Video.summary: After the murder of a crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: arrest the killer or let him go.
Video.title: Playing God

Video.summary: Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride - CHARLES HALLAHAN stars.
Video.title: The Jade Woman

Video.summary: Racial tensions mount after the accidental shooting of the son of a Hispanic councilman by police.
Video.title: Flashpoint

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall spend a frightening night in a remote mansion with a family of murder suspects.
Video.title: Night On Bald Mountain

Video.summary: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 1

Video.summary: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 2

Video.summary: McCall fails to report a felony, and Hunter tries to trap the killer of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 3

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a reporter and uncover a plot involving a wealthy industrialist.
Video.title: Turning Point

Video.summary: Suspicion arises when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who stole her million-dollar necklace.
Video.title: Hot Prowl

Video.summary: Investigating the death of Hunter's former girlfriend - did she jump or was she pushed from a highrise window?
Video.title: Allegra

Video.summary: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.
Video.title: Renegade

Video.summary: Detective Doyle helps investigate the real life murder of an actress-turned-prostitute who was cut in half.
Video.title: The Black Dahlia

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a famous actress and meet her sister, hungry for the inheritance.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 1
